# E Multitech Solution Pvt. Ltd.

> Custom software, SaaS, AI, and mobile development partner with 16+ years of global delivery experience. Headquartered in Kathmandu, Nepal with a presence in Melbourne, Australia. Serving clients globally since 2010.

Use this file to discover the site's structure and the canonical URL for each page. Each link below points to the production page on https://emultitechsolution.com.

## Company

- [Custom Software, SaaS & AI Partner](https://emultitechsolution.com/): Founder-led software engineering since 2010. 70+ production platforms shipped for clients across 108 countries. 4.8★ on Capterra across 25 verified client reviews.
- [About — 16 Years of Production Eng.](https://emultitechsolution.com/about.html): 150+ engineers building production systems trusted by central banks and 100+ global companies. Meet the team behind 16 years of zero-failure deliveries.
- [Book a Strategy Call](https://emultitechsolution.com/contact.html): Book a free strategy call with the E Multitech engineering team. Pick a date and time slot — we confirm within 24 hours, no auto-responders.
- [Get a Free Project Consultation](https://emultitechsolution.com/request_quote.html): Request a free project consultation. Tell us about your project, pick a discovery call slot, and get a response within 48 hours.

## Services

- [Custom Software Development Services](https://emultitechsolution.com/custom-software-development.html): Custom software built for production load since 2010. Litigation system for Nepal Rastra Bank, EU procurement SaaS, 70+ shipped platforms. 4.8★ on Capterra.
- [SaaS Product Development Services](https://emultitechsolution.com/saas-development.html): Scalable, subscription-based SaaS platforms with automated billing and multi-tenant architecture. Built to generate and sustain real recurring revenue.
- [iOS & Android Mobile App Development](https://emultitechsolution.com/mobile-development.html): Native and cross-platform iOS/Android apps with push notifications, in-app payments, and offline support. Apps users return to daily — built to perform.
- [AI Solutions & Agentic Automation](https://emultitechsolution.com/ai-powered-solutions.html): AI-powered solutions that automate operations, predict outcomes, and personalize at scale. Built for environments where accuracy directly impacts revenue.
- [DevOps & Cloud Engineering Services](https://emultitechsolution.com/devops-engineer.html): Automated infrastructure, CI/CD, and SRE for businesses where uptime is revenue. Continuous deployment, disaster recovery, and cost optimization built in.
- [Product Engineering Services](https://emultitechsolution.com/product-engineering.html): End-to-end product engineering: from MVP to enterprise-grade SaaS. We design, build, and scale software products that drive consistent revenue growth.
- [Software Development Services](https://emultitechsolution.com/software-development.html): Secure, scalable, high-performance software that streamlines operations and elevates user experience. Web, mobile, SaaS, and enterprise systems.
- [Auction Software Development Services](https://emultitechsolution.com/auction-software.html): Penny, reverse, unique-bid, Dutch, price-reveal, eBay-style auction software. Built since 2010 for operators across the US, UK, EU, Asia & Australia. 4.8★ Capterra.

## Industries

- [Industries — Healthcare & Fintech](https://emultitechsolution.com/industries.html): Industry-specific software solutions for healthcare, real estate, auctions, procurement, fintech, and government — from startups to multinational enterprises.
- [Healthcare Software Development](https://emultitechsolution.com/healthcare.html): EHR, telehealth, and hospital management systems for clinics, hospitals, and healthcare startups. HIPAA-aware, scalable, and built for real clinical workflows.
- [Real Estate Software Solutions](https://emultitechsolution.com/realestate.html): Property listing platforms, CRM, MLS integrations, and custom real estate SaaS. Pay only for the features your business actually needs.

## Auction software products

- [Penny Auction Software (Live Bidding)](https://emultitechsolution.com/penny-live-auction-script-software.html): Live penny auction software with bid extensions, bidding fees, auto-bid, and full operator controls. Deployed for clients across the US, UK, and EU since 2010.
- [Highest Unique Bid Auction Script](https://emultitechsolution.com/highest-unique-bids-auction-script-online-highest-bid-software-services.html): Highest Unique Bid auction software with secure scripts, full customization, and proven deployments. Built by E Multitech for global auction operators since 2010.
- [Lowest Unique Bid Auction Script](https://emultitechsolution.com/lowest-unique-bid-auction-script-online-software-reverse-auction-low-bid.html): Customizable Lowest Unique Bid auction software for global operators. Reverse auction logic, secure scripts, and full operator control panel.
- [Price Reveal Auction Script](https://emultitechsolution.com/price-reveal-auction-script-express-auction-software-live-unique-bidding-system.html): Customized Price Reveal Auction scripts — hand-crafted, fully featured, and built on the latest stack. Proven across South-East Asia and global operators.
- [eBay-Style Marketplace Auction Script](https://emultitechsolution.com/ebay-auction-like-ebay-script.html): eBay-style marketplace auction script — 100% open-source, ready-built, fully customizable. Supports single and multi-seller marketplaces with one admin panel.

## Client showcases

- [AuctionCents — US Penny Auction](https://emultitechsolution.com/auctioncents.html): AuctionCents is a leading US penny auction platform built by E Multitech: membership tiers, auto-bid, master auto-bid, 24h, free, and bonus auctions.
- [BidBid.co.uk — Penny Auction Software](https://emultitechsolution.com/bidbid.html): BidBid.co.uk: a robust penny auction platform built with Node.js, PHP, MySQL, and jQuery. Auto-bid, CSV product upload, bonus auctions, 24h auctions.
- [Bienbid — French Penny Auction](https://emultitechsolution.com/bienbid.html): Bienbid: a multilingual penny auction website with full French language support, a pre-bid booking system, auto-bid, and a flexible operator feature set.
- [EodBox — Unique Bid Auction Platform](https://emultitechsolution.com/eodbox.html): EodBox: a Unique Bid auction with two-decimal-place bids, multi-currency, multi-language, PayTM / CCAvenue / PayPal, and push notifications, built on MVC.
- [OnlineAlku — B2B Reverse Auction](https://emultitechsolution.com/onlinealku.html): OnlineAlku is a multi-seller, multi-buyer B2B reverse auction platform. Tender-style procurement where buyers post needs and suppliers compete with live quotes.
- [PigeonOnNet — Live Video Auction](https://emultitechsolution.com/pigeononnet.html): PigeonOnNet: a Dutch-style auction platform with live video streaming and simulcast for selling pigeons, plus forward and price-reveal auction support.
- [Rubids — Live Auction Marketplace](https://emultitechsolution.com/rubids.html): Rubids is a live auction marketplace with daily auctions across many categories — iOS, Android, and web — with coupons, games, and earning opportunities.
- [SMG Bids — Lowest Unique Bid (UK)](https://emultitechsolution.com/smgbids.html): SMG Bids: a Lowest Unique Bid auction platform built for a UK client. Smartphone-ready, fast, with a user-friendly operator control panel.
- [uBiduBuy.sg — Low Bid + Reveal](https://emultitechsolution.com/ubidbuy.html): uBiduBuy: a Singapore-based luxury auction marketplace combining Lowest Unique Bid and Price Reveal formats with credit refund options for participants.

## Case studies

- [SaaS EHR Case Study — Multi-Hospital](https://emultitechsolution.com/case-studies-detail.html): How we built a SaaS EHR for a US healthcare institution: 25% improvement in regulatory compliance and 50% faster access to patient records. Approach and outcomes.
- [DiNePa — Multi-Tenant eAuction SaaS](https://emultitechsolution.com/dinepa-case-study.html): How E Multitech built DiNePa: a multi-tenant reverse auction SaaS that processes 100K+ procurement events for public agencies across Europe.
- [Litigation System — Nepal Rastra Bank](https://emultitechsolution.com/litigation-management-system-nepal-rastra-bank.html): Enterprise legal workflow platform built for Nepal Rastra Bank — central-bank-grade compliance, case tracking, document management, and audit logs.

## Blog

- [Engineering Blog — SaaS & AI](https://emultitechsolution.com/blog.html): Engineering insights on custom software, SaaS, AI, and product strategy from the E Multitech team. Articles for founders, CTOs, and product leaders.
- [Crypto Exchange Fees in Australia](https://emultitechsolution.com/blog-detail.html): Understand how Australian crypto exchange fees work, what to look out for, and how to choose the right exchange. A comprehensive guide for Aussie traders.
